any resources to see which covenant goes on who and mainstat/substat preference per piece?
Ryker's made a basic table with the list of potential main stats and the full list of covenants with some basic recommendations.
Though I don't think it's been made into a thread yet, I might ask him if I can compile all the resources he's made into one thread on the English Chat.

In terms of Covenant substat preference, I think it's semi-intuitive, since there's 8 possible substat options only:

If you are a primary damage dealer, then you want Crit Rate/Damage.
If your team is focused on Poison or Retaliate, then you want Attack Potency (on everyone)
If you want to ult, take Aliemus Recharge.
If you want Posse, take Silver Key Charge.
If your character specifically scales off of the stat, take Black Sigil Drop or Death Resistance, otherwise these tend to be ignorable.
And then Realm Mastery is, well, Realm Dependent, though again, similar to the other support stats, some characters also scale off it iirc.
Only a gear set scales off realm mastery iirc
But realm mastery is always nice to have

Chaos kinda like it.
Ultra it depends on how close you hit your hand limits.

It is also good for chaos if you have 24
It also just like, directly synergises with Tentacles.
Most blue units are ult focused
Realm Mastery doesn't give Aliemus in Blue.
But Blue mostly like Realm Mastery because it directly interacts with their Tentacle Gameplay, basically.
The one who takes full advantage of Blue Realm Mastery is Tulu
